final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cross-border e-commerce promotional poster with typographic art and layered text composition, intended for advertising/marketing use.

Style/medium: commercial promotional poster, graphic design with decorative art typography and type-stacking layout
Composition: 16:9 horizontal layout; layered typographic hierarchy with stacked font treatments; hero product or subject physically overlapping and occluding portions of the background text layers, creating depth
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotion; hero product (or branded subject) placed centrally, partially masking stacked lettering behind it
Scene/backdrop: visually rich but structured background — complex yet organized, no visual clutter
Lighting/mood: bold, energetic, promotional — high visual impact to drive viewer action
Color palette: vivid, high-contrast commercial palette suitable for cross-border e-commerce advertising
Materials/textures: mixed typographic textures — decorative art lettering, stacked oversized type, layered graphic elements
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: art typography required; type-stacking effect required; product/subject must visually overlap and partially cover background text; composition must feel complex but not chaotic; strict 16:9 aspect ratio
Avoid: flat single-layer layout, sparse minimalist design, cluttered illegible mess, generic stock-photo collage aesthetic
